sections.title: Before speaking to the Easter Bunny

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Well hello there sweetheart.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: What brings you down here?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the Easter Bunny.

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Fancy that! You're in luck, he's in the next room.

sections.title: After a player has started cheering up the Easter Bunny

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Look who it is! I heard the Easter Bunny gave you a true thrashing on that alley.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh yeah, I got outplayed fair and square!

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: It seems to have lifted his spirits somewhat, thanks for doing that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm just glad to cheer him up a bit.

sections.title: Talking after cheering the Easter Bunny up three times

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Hey, [player name]. I thought it was really sweet of you to help cheer up that bunny.

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Maybe we could go bowling sometime and you could cheer me up too?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That would be fun, though I'm quite busy at the moment, and in the near future.

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: What about the far future?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh the far future is looking very busy for me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But if I find the time, we could invite the Easter Bunny too! We'd all have a great game I'm sure.

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Oh, I see. Nevermind then, if you're so busy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm trying to cheer up the Easter Bunny, do you have any suggestions?

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Hmm, well, he's a sensible bunny, I'm sure he'd love to go carrot bowling!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Bowling? Where can we do that?

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: It just so happens we have a carrot bowling alley right here in the Rabbit Hole!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Really? Wow! That's fortunate. Where is it?

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Through the door to the east, turn left, then it's on the right. You can't miss it!

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Well, maybe you can. Depends on your navigational skills I suppose.

lines.speaker: Bella Le Bowle
lines.text: Anyway, talk to Bowley Moley when you get there, I'm sure he will be happy to help.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, I'll have a look for this bowling alley and speak to Bowley Moley. Thanks!
